title: An expression has two different value in two queries
poc: SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0 WHERE ((ATAN2(( (((t0.c0)NOT REGEXP(t0.c0)))|(t0.c0)), (- ('o'))))AND( t0.c0 IN ((0), (1))));
SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0 WHERE ((ATAN2(( (((t0.c0)NOT REGEXP(t0.c0)))|(t0.c0)), (- ('o'))))AND( t0.c0 IN (SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0)));
key_bug_features: Different results from equivalent SQL queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO t1(id, value) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, NULL), (3, 'example');
SELECT value FROM t1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM t1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 BOOL, c1 INT DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO t2(c0, c1) VALUES (TRUE, 1), (FALSE, 2), (NULL, NULL);
